|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `sink_class_name` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `TString("")`
Name of the corresponding class.

Must be registered using `YT_FLOW_DEFINE_SINK`. ||
|| `input_stream_ids` | **Type**: `THashSet<NYT::NFlow::TStrongIdentifierTypedef<NYT::NFlow::TStreamIdTag>>`
**Default value**: `[]`
List of input streams.

Only streams specified in `output_stream_ids` of the entire `Computation` are allowed here. ||
|| `parameters` | **Type**: `NYT::TIntrusivePtr<NYT::NYTree::IMapNode>`
**Default value**: `{}`
Arbitrary parameters for the corresponding class. ||
